fr:mainmatter.fr:p: If A is contractible and B\colon A \to \mathsf {Type} is a family of contractible types, then the dependent sum \mathchoice {\textstyle \sum _{ \mathopen {}\left \lparen x:A\right \rparen \mathclose {} }}{\textstyle \sum _{ \mathopen {}\left \lparen x:A\right \rparen \mathclose {} }}{\scriptstyle \sum _{ \mathopen {}\left \lparen x:A\right \rparen \mathclose {} }}{\scriptscriptstyle \sum _{ \mathopen {}\left \lparen x:A\right \rparen \mathclose {} }}Bx is contractible.
